item.title: Undelete NTFS Partition Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Undelete NTFS Partition Files [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryutility
item.itunes:summary:
Undelete NTFS Partition Files
(Utilities)
Windows NTFS data restorer utility is the best and reliable files recovery solution for corrupted or formatted hard disks and removable storage devices. Tool supports retrieval of lost data from different cases like accidental deletion, overwritten, formatted, corrupted partition, power failures etc. Hard disk NTFS partition repair utility provides recovery in several data loss situations like boot record failure, corrupt MFT, deleted DBR or MBR files, virus infection etc. Undelete laptop partition data software can bring back all your important folders stored in NTFS file system even if system displays various kind of messages error like boot failure, boot record missing, invalid command, disk error, primary or secondary hard disk failure etc. Corrupted notebook files undelete program provides full support to all windows based operating system including Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. NTFS5 partition file system retrieval utility scan inaccessible hard disk for damages and corruptions and restores various types data like music, pictures, video, digital image, photo etc. Notebook Vista files recovery software provides support to long files names stored in windows NTFS partition. Tool can recover files, directories which are deleted partially or completely. Features: * NTFS partition rescue tool retrieve lost MBR, DBR and corrupted MFT file system. * Windows Vista files recovery tool can easily repair corrupt hard disks and any kind of storage media. * Tool can also recover encrypted or compressed NTFS files. * Vista partition recovery tool provides interactive graphical user interface and does not require any technical skill to operate it.

[read more]
item.description:
Undelete NTFS Partition Files
(Utilities)
Windows NTFS data restorer utility is the best and reliable files recovery solution for corrupted or formatted hard disks and removable storage devices. Tool supports retrieval of lost data from different cases like accidental deletion, overwritten, formatted, corrupted partition, power failures etc. Hard disk NTFS partition repair utility provides recovery in several data loss situations like boot record failure, corrupt MFT, deleted DBR or MBR files, virus infection etc. Undelete laptop partition data software can bring back all your important folders stored in NTFS file system even if system displays various kind of messages error like boot failure, boot record missing, invalid command, disk error, primary or secondary hard disk failure etc. Corrupted notebook files undelete program provides full support to all windows based operating system including Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. Tool can recover files, directories which are deleted partially or completely. [read more]

Undelete NTFS Partition Files

Windows NTFS data restorer utility is the best and reliable files recovery solution for corrupted or formatted hard disks and removable storage devices. Tool supports retrieval of lost data from different cases like accidental deletion, overwritten, formatted, corrupted partition, power failures etc. Hard disk NTFS partition repair utility provides recovery in several data loss situations like boot record failure, corrupt MFT, deleted DBR or MBR files, virus infection etc. Undelete laptop partition data software can bring back all your important folders stored in NTFS file system even if system displays various kind of messages error like boot failure, boot record missing, invalid command, disk error, primary or secondary hard disk failure etc. Corrupted notebook files undelete program provides full support to all windows based operating system including Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. NTFS5 partition file system retrieval utility scan inaccessible hard disk for damages and corruptions and restores various types data like music, pictures, video, digital image, photo etc. Notebook Vista files recovery software provides support to long files names stored in windows NTFS partition. Tool can recover files, directories which are deleted partially or completely. Features: * NTFS partition rescue tool retrieve lost MBR, DBR and corrupted MFT file system. * Windows Vista files recovery tool can easily repair corrupt hard disks and any kind of storage media. * Tool can also recover encrypted or compressed NTFS files. * Vista partition recovery tool provides interactive graphical user interface and does not require any technical skill to operate it.

item.title: Files Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Files Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: filerecoverysof
item.itunes:summary:
Files Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Professional Files Recovery Software easily introduced by company www.filesrecovery.in that is used to regain lost pictures from storage device which gets formatted because of virus attacks on different types of memory card available in market.
[read more]
item.description:
Files Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Professional Files Recovery Software easily introduced by company www.filesrecovery.in that is used to regain lost pictures from storage device which gets formatted because of virus attacks on different types of memory card available in market.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Files Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Professional Files Recovery Software easily introduced by company www.filesrecovery.in that is used to regain lost pictures from storage device which gets formatted because of virus attacks on different types of memory card available in market.
[read more]

item.title: FAT Files Salvage Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: FAT Files Salvage Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryutility
item.itunes:summary:
FAT Files Salvage Tool
(Utilities)
Hard disk FAT partition data recovery software recovers your accidentally deleted files and formatted folders. Utility can restore data from damaged bad sector and crashed hard disk or volume. FAT data rescue utility software can repair formatted, damaged and corrupted SATA, ATA, EIDE, SCSI hard drives which supports FAT partitions. FAT partition data retrieval software supports FAT12, FAT16 and FAT32 files system. FAT partition restoration tool easily recovers data from hard disk even your storage media is corrupted. Data recovery is also possible when data is corrupted due to software or hardware malfunction, crashed storage media like EIDE, IDE, SCSI, ATA, power failure, virus attack and damaged hard disk or drive. FAT partition data file rescue software is quick solution to restore lost data from storage media. FAT data restoration utility can support windows operating systems like Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. Tool can restore data recovery even files, folders and directory has been deleted after pressing (shift+Del) key or from recycle bin. Windows FAT partition recovery software retrieves data from encrypted or compressed boot sector files, corrupted and damaged hard drive. Software is user-friendly due to interactive graphical user interface. Feature: *FAT partition recovery tool can repair corrupted or formatted hard disk. *FAT partition data recovery software restores data from previously existing partitions. *It can supports install and uninstall.*Utility is non-destructive and read-only.

[read more]
item.description:
FAT Files Salvage Tool
(Utilities)
Hard disk FAT partition data recovery software recovers your accidentally deleted files and formatted folders. Utility can restore data from damaged bad sector and crashed hard disk or volume. FAT data rescue utility software can repair formatted, damaged and corrupted SATA, ATA, EIDE, SCSI hard drives which supports FAT partitions. FAT partition data retrieval software supports FAT12, FAT16 and FAT32 files system. FAT partition restoration tool easily recovers data from hard disk even your storage media is corrupted. Windows FAT partition recovery software retrieves data from encrypted or compressed boot sector files, corrupted and damaged hard drive. Software is user-friendly due to interactive graphical user interface. Feature: *FAT partition recovery tool can repair corrupted or formatted hard disk. *FAT partition data recovery software restores data from previously existing partitions. *It can supports install and uninstall.*Utility is non-destructive and read-only.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
FAT Files Salvage Tool
(Utilities)
Hard disk FAT partition data recovery software recovers your accidentally deleted files and formatted folders. Utility can restore data from damaged bad sector and crashed hard disk or volume. FAT data rescue utility software can repair formatted, damaged and corrupted SATA, ATA, EIDE, SCSI hard drives which supports FAT partitions. FAT partition data retrieval software supports FAT12, FAT16 and FAT32 files system. FAT partition restoration tool easily recovers data from hard disk even your storage media is corrupted. Data recovery is also possible when data is corrupted due to software or hardware malfunction, crashed storage media like EIDE, IDE, SCSI, ATA, power failure, virus attack and damaged hard disk or drive. FAT partition data file rescue software is quick solution to restore lost data from storage media. FAT data restoration utility can support windows operating systems like Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. Tool can restore data recovery even files, folders and directory has been deleted after pressing (shift+Del) key or from recycle bin. Windows FAT partition recovery software retrieves data from encrypted or compressed boot sector files, corrupted and damaged hard drive. Software is user-friendly due to interactive graphical user interface. Feature: *FAT partition recovery tool can repair corrupted or formatted hard disk. *FAT partition data recovery software restores data from previously existing partitions. *It can supports install and uninstall.*Utility is non-destructive and read-only.

[read more]

item.title: PDA Mobile Investigation Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: PDA Mobile Investigation Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryutility
item.itunes:summary:
PDA Mobile Investigation Software
(Utilities)
PDA monitoring software gather all necessary information of pocket pc cell phone related to software and hardware architecture. Pocket pc forensic software is very useful for investigation agency for finding any evidence from cell phone device. PDA monitoring software quickly and safely extorts important information of Windows based mobile phone and save all information in a text file for future use. Pocket pc monitor software support all windows based operating system including Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. Pocket pc investigation software is designed using an advanced algorithm that efficiently calculates the remaining battery time, based on your usage profile and provide details of last used application. PDA forensic utility deeply scrutinizes and extracts all information related to operating system registry. PDA surveillance software supports all type of windows based mobile phone like E-ten M600 Pocket PC Phone, Audiovox PPC, Anextek, Asus Pocket PC Phone, HTC MteoR Smart phone, Asus Pocket PC Phone, i-mate Smartflip, Gigabyte gSmart i120, Audiovox Thera, Carrier Devices i-Mate Smartphone, Hitachi Pocket PC phone, Pantech PH-S8000T smartphone, Motorola i930, Dopod StrTrk S300, Samsung SCH-i730 Pocket PC phone, GSMK Cryptophone, HP iPAQ hw6515 and other brands. Features: * Pocket pc monitor software capable to detect hardware information from any type of Windows based mobile phone. * Quickly extract SIM, phonebook, contacts, battery status, manufacture detail and other useful information within few minutes. * User interactive GUI interface and small size of software make comfortable with all pocket pc cell phone. * PDA surveillance tool generate reports that are very helpful in forensic investigation of pocket pc mobile.

[read more]
item.description:
PDA Mobile Investigation Software
(Utilities)
PDA monitoring software gather all necessary information of pocket pc cell phone related to software and hardware architecture. Pocket pc forensic software is very useful for investigation agency for finding any evidence from cell phone device. [read more]

PDA Mobile Investigation Software
(Utilities)
PDA monitoring software gather all necessary information of pocket pc cell phone related to software and hardware architecture. Pocket pc forensic software is very useful for investigation agency for finding any evidence from cell phone device. PDA monitoring software quickly and safely extorts important information of Windows based mobile phone and save all information in a text file for future use. Pocket pc monitor software support all windows based operating system including Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. Pocket pc investigation software is designed using an advanced algorithm that efficiently calculates the remaining battery time, based on your usage profile and provide details of last used application. PDA forensic utility deeply scrutinizes and extracts all information related to operating system registry. PDA surveillance software supports all type of windows based mobile phone like E-ten M600 Pocket PC Phone, Audiovox PPC, Anextek, Asus Pocket PC Phone, HTC MteoR Smart phone, Asus Pocket PC Phone, i-mate Smartflip, Gigabyte gSmart i120, Audiovox Thera, Carrier Devices i-Mate Smartphone, Hitachi Pocket PC phone, Pantech PH-S8000T smartphone, Motorola i930, Dopod StrTrk S300, Samsung SCH-i730 Pocket PC phone, GSMK Cryptophone, HP iPAQ hw6515 and other brands. item.title: Cell Phone Sim Card Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Cell Phone Sim Card Data Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryutility
item.itunes:summary:
Cell Phone Sim Card Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Mobile GSM Phonebook backup tool is the best alternate to the expensive and time consuming recovery devices to rescue deleted messages and contacts from 3G/GSM mobile phone. Locked mobile sim card data recovery utility efficiently restores lost messages from sim card even when Sim Card Not Recognized or Insert the Sim card messages are displayed on your mobile screen. Freeware simcard data recovery tool rescue sim card general information like IMSI (International mobile subscriber identity) number, ICC-ID (Integrated circuit card identity) number, SPN (service provider name) and PIN (personal identification number) etc. Sim card information reader tool can securely retrieve lost mobile saved messages or contact numbers and supports all windows operating system including Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. Unerase simcard lost data utility provides advance and enhanced recovery services to rescue lost mobile information in less turnaround time. USB sim card reader utility provides assurance for recovery of all your deleted messages from inbox, outbox, sent item or draft with exact data and time and also sender or receiver name. Features: * Locked mobile sim card data recovery software recovers corrupted or erased phone book history from any USB sim card reader device like Nokia, LG, Motorola, Samsung or Soy Ericson etc. * Sim card contacts reader software supports all network providers like Vodafone, Airtel, Idea, BSNL or MTNL etc. * SIM card message recovery solution also provides sim card information like IMSI, ICC-ID, SPN or PIN number. * Mobile simcard data backup program supports all windows operating system along with windows vista.

[read more]
item.description:
Cell Phone Sim Card Data Recovery
(Utilities)
Mobile GSM Phonebook backup tool is the best alternate to the expensive and time consuming recovery devices to rescue deleted messages and contacts from 3G/GSM mobile phone. Locked mobile sim card data recovery utility efficiently restores lost messages from sim card even when Sim Card Not Recognized or Insert the Sim card messages are displayed on your mobile screen. Freeware simcard data recovery tool rescue sim card general information like IMSI (International mobile subscriber identity) number, ICC-ID (Integrated circuit card identity) number, SPN (service provider name) and PIN (personal identification number) etc. Sim card information reader tool can securely retrieve lost mobile saved messages or contact numbers and supports all windows operating system including Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. [read more]

(Utilities)
Mobile GSM Phonebook backup tool is the best alternate to the expensive and time consuming recovery devices to rescue deleted messages and contacts from 3G/GSM mobile phone. Freeware simcard data recovery tool rescue sim card general information like IMSI (International mobile subscriber identity) number, ICC-ID (Integrated circuit card identity) number, SPN (service provider name) and PIN (personal identification number) etc. Sim card information reader tool can securely retrieve lost mobile saved messages or contact numbers and supports all windows operating system including Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. item.title: ClamAV-GUI [Security]
item.itunes:title: ClamAV-GUI [Security]
item.itunes:author: wusel1007
item.itunes:summary:
ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
A graphical Front-End for the ClamAV Anti-Virus Scanner. It uses freshclam as a backend for signature updates
and provides a scheduler for timed virus scanns.

Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome

Repository for OpenSuSE Tumbleweed
https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/openSUSE_Tumbleweed/home:wusel1007.repo

Repository for OpenSuSE 15.6
https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.6/home:wusel1007.repo

Repository for OpenSuSE 15.5
https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.5/home:wusel1007.repo

Repository for OpenSuSE 15.4
https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/home:wusel1007/15.4/home:wusel1007.repo

Use:
- sudo zypper addrepo "Path to Repo"
- sudo zypper refresh

[read more]

ClamAV-GUI
(Security)
A graphical Front-End for the ClamAV Anti-Virus Scanner. It uses freshclam as a backend for signature updates
and provides a scheduler for timed virus scanns.

Please let me know whether the app works to your liking or not. Comments welcome

item.title: Digital Media Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Media Recovery Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryutility
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Media Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Removable storage media files retrieval software restores lost or deleted data from formatted or corrupted drives. Utility is capable of recovering all major flash media file formats like JPG, JPEG, TXT, DOC, WAV, WMA, HTML and XHTML. Digital media files rescue tool recovers files accidently emptied from recycle bin or misplaced from formatted and re-formatted disks. Software supports USB media drives of various capacities. Software can be used when files are lost due to software failure, hardware malfunction and virus or Trojan generated losses from various storage drives. Software is compatible with Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8 operating systems. All types of files such as text documents, power point presentations, html documents, video, music and images are easily recovered using this software. Tool is economical and easy to access. User does not require any specific technical training to use this software because it has a highly interactive graphical user interface (GUI). Tool supports data recovery of all popular drives like pen drive, multimedia card, compact flash memory card, thumb drive, zip drive, PDA and other equivalent handheld computer devices. Software supports major brands of removable media drives like Sony, HP, Samsung, Toshiba, Quantum and Kingston. Features: * Supports recovery of files from all major flash media drives. * Capable of restoring files even if error messages (FILE NOT FOUND and DRIVE IS NOT FORMATTED) are generated by computer. * This software is compatible with Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8 operating systems. * Utility rescues deleted or formatted files within minute time. * Software is cost-effective and does not harm the original files.

[read more]
item.description:
Digital Media Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Removable storage media files retrieval software restores lost or deleted data from formatted or corrupted drives. Utility is capable of recovering all major flash media file formats like JPG, JPEG, TXT, DOC, WAV, WMA, HTML and XHTML. Digital media files rescue tool recovers files accidently emptied from recycle bin or misplaced from formatted and re-formatted disks. Software supports USB media drives of various capacities. Tool supports data recovery of all popular drives like pen drive, multimedia card, compact flash memory card, thumb drive, zip drive, PDA and other equivalent handheld computer devices. Software supports major brands of removable media drives like Sony, HP, Samsung, Toshiba, Quantum and Kingston. Features: * Supports recovery of files from all major flash media drives. * Capable of restoring files even if error messages (FILE NOT FOUND and DRIVE IS NOT FORMATTED) are generated by computer. * This software is compatible with Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8 operating systems. * Utility rescues deleted or formatted files within minute time. * Software is cost-effective and does not harm the original files.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Digital Media Recovery Software
(Utilities)
Removable storage media files retrieval software restores lost or deleted data from formatted or corrupted drives. Utility is capable of recovering all major flash media file formats like JPG, JPEG, TXT, DOC, WAV, WMA, HTML and XHTML. Digital media files rescue tool recovers files accidently emptied from recycle bin or misplaced from formatted and re-formatted disks. Software supports USB media drives of various capacities. Software can be used when files are lost due to software failure, hardware malfunction and virus or Trojan generated losses from various storage drives. Software is compatible with Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8 operating systems. All types of files such as text documents, power point presentations, html documents, video, music and images are easily recovered using this software. Tool is economical and easy to access. User does not require any specific technical training to use this software because it has a highly interactive graphical user interface (GUI). Tool supports data recovery of all popular drives like pen drive, multimedia card, compact flash memory card, thumb drive, zip drive, PDA and other equivalent handheld computer devices. Software supports major brands of removable media drives like Sony, HP, Samsung, Toshiba, Quantum and Kingston. Features: * Supports recovery of files from all major flash media drives. * Capable of restoring files even if error messages (FILE NOT FOUND and DRIVE IS NOT FORMATTED) are generated by computer. * This software is compatible with Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8 operating systems. * Utility rescues deleted or formatted files within minute time. * Software is cost-effective and does not harm the original files.

[read more]

item.title: Data Recovery Utility [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Data Recovery Utility [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryutility
item.itunes:summary:
Data Recovery Utility
(Utilities)
Advance data recovery program provides facility to restore corrupted data and file from your computer system. Data Recovery Utility is fully capable to recover music file, picture from storage devices that erased due to virus detection. www.datadoctor.co.in has ability to restore important missing files and folder from pc. Advance data recovery software is capable to recover deleted valuable details and other type of system information in minimum time of interval. Download data recovery application provides facility to restore missing file and folder from hard disk. Free download data recovery program has capability to retrieve deleted photo, mp3 songs, picture and images from digital camera. Data recovery software is used to restore different type of files/ folder that permanently deleted from storage drives. Advance data recovery application allows recovering erased contact number and important massages for your mobile phone inbox. Free download data recovery program enables to restore file and folder that delete from your computer system due to power failure. Data recovery tool provides facility to retrieve data and valuable documents from your computer that erased due to virus attack. Download data recovery application helps to restore important information and valuable documents from portable storage devices. Free download data recovery software provides facility to recover data from your system that erased during system partitioning. Advance data recovery program has ability to restore different type of deleted file and folders from pen drive. Feature:- *Download data recovery application restores corrupted data and files from portable storage devices. *Advance data recovery software easily recover deleted all type of important information from your pc. *Data recovery program retrieves missing music file, audio/ video song, images and picture from hard disk. *Free download data recovery tool easily restore files/folders permanently deleted from memory card.

[read more]

Data recovery software is used to restore different type of files/ folder that permanently deleted from storage drives. Advance data recovery application allows recovering erased contact number and important massages for your mobile phone inbox. Free download data recovery program enables to restore file and folder that delete from your computer system due to power failure. Data recovery tool provides facility to retrieve data and valuable documents from your computer that erased due to virus attack. Download data recovery application helps to restore important information and valuable documents from portable storage devices. Free download data recovery software provides facility to recover data from your system that erased during system partitioning. Advance data recovery program has ability to restore different type of deleted file and folders from pen drive. Feature:- *Download data recovery application restores corrupted data and files from portable storage devices. *Advance data recovery software easily recover deleted all type of important information from your pc. *Data recovery program retrieves missing music file, audio/ video song, images and picture from hard disk. *Free download data recovery tool easily restore files/folders permanently deleted from memory card.

[read more]

item.title: Barcode Image Maker Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Barcode Image Maker Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecoveryutility
item.itunes:summary:
Barcode Image Maker Software
(Utilities)
Download barcode label creator application to create bar code images of customized resolution of various ranges. Professional barcode image creator tool is used for several organizations whose key products are identification cards, video tape labels, CD labels, food products, price marking, pharmaceutical products etc. Barcode image creator wizard allows you to fully customize bar code Caption colour, Caption font, Barcode colour, Background colour and Barcode size of the created barcode labels. Bar code symbol creator utility can easily print generated output using normal printers, so its necessary for users to go for thermal printers or barcode printers. Barcode printer software is reliable in generating printable barcode label, asset tags or stickers with support to all major barcode font standards including Interleaved 2of5, Code 39, Code 11, UCC128, CODE128, EAN13, EAN8, IND25, POSTNET, UPCA, UPCE, PLANET and MSI PLESSEY, Codabar, Code 93 etc. Barcode generation solution comes with interactive graphical user interface and supports all windows operating systems such as Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. 2D barcode creator utility can save barcode image common graphics formats such as BMP, JPEG, GIF and TIF. Features: *Barcode labeling program can generate several bar code images at once, so it can be used in several industries where workload of manual data entry is too high. *Generated result can be saving in commonly used file formats. *Utility is available with many customizable modes, so that user can edit barcode to several extents. *Tool is interactive and comes with help manual, which demonstrates it easily.

[read more]

Barcode Image Maker Software
(Utilities)
Download barcode label creator application to create bar code images of customized resolution of various ranges. Professional barcode image creator tool is used for several organizations whose key products are identification cards, video tape labels, CD labels, food products, price marking, pharmaceutical products etc. Barcode image creator wizard allows you to fully customize bar code Caption colour, Caption font, Barcode colour, Background colour and Barcode size of the created barcode labels. Bar code symbol creator utility can easily print generated output using normal printers, so its necessary for users to go for thermal printers or barcode printers. Barcode printer software is reliable in generating printable barcode label, asset tags or stickers with support to all major barcode font standards including Interleaved 2of5, Code 39, Code 11, UCC128, CODE128, EAN13, EAN8, IND25, POSTNET, UPCA, UPCE, PLANET and MSI PLESSEY, Codabar, Code 93 etc. Barcode generation solution comes with interactive graphical user interface and supports all windows operating systems such as Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8. 2D barcode creator utility can save barcode image common graphics formats such as BMP, JPEG, GIF and TIF. Features: *Barcode labeling program can generate several bar code images at once, so it can be used in several industries where workload of manual data entry is too high. *Generated result can be saving in commonly used file formats. *Utility is available with many customizable modes, so that user can edit barcode to several extents. *Tool is interactive and comes with help manual, which demonstrates it easily.
